universe_definition: Active members aged 18-100 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol who have opted into SMS and are not suppressed
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps, prioritized by conversion rate weight (0.4)
name: Diabetes with Open Preventive Care Gap
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.care_gaps cg WHERE cg.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(cg.status) = 'open' AND LOWER(cg.measure_category) = 'preventive') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE)
rationale: This bucket targets members with diabetes who have an open preventive care gap, optimizing for conversion rate. Members with open gaps are more likely to engage with medication adherence programs. The SMS should emphasize preventive care and medication adherence.
suggested_treatment: Focus on preventive care and medication adherence for diabetes management.
coverage_note: This set of buckets covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members who have not engaged with SMS recently and do not have open preventive care gaps.

universe_definition: Active members aged 18-100 in NE or IA with diabetes, hypertension, or high cholesterol who have opted into SMS and are not suppressed
primary_slicing_axis: Open preventive care gaps, prioritized by conversion rate weight (0.4)
name: Diabetes with Recent SMS Engagement
sql: SELECT DISTINCT m.member_id, m.first_name, m.last_name, m.email, m.phone_mobile FROM marketing_ai.members m JOIN marketing_ai.addresses a ON m.address_id = a.address_id JOIN marketing_ai.member_conditions mc ON m.member_id = mc.member_id WHERE LOWER(m.status) = 'active' AND m.date_of_birth BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '100 years' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '18 years' AND LOWER(a.state) IN ('ne', 'ia') AND LOWER(mc.icd10_code) LIKE 'e11%' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.sms_events se WHERE se.member_id = m.member_id AND se.event_timestamp >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '180 days' AND LOWER(se.event_type) = 'replied') AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.consent_preferences cp WHERE cp.member_id = m.member_id AND cp.sms_opt_in = TRUE) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.suppression_lists sl WHERE sl.member_id = m.member_id AND LOWER(sl.channel) = 'sms' AND (sl.expires_at IS NULL OR sl.expires_at > CURRENT_DATE)) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM marketing_ai.enrollments e WHERE e.member_id = m.member_id AND e.is_active = TRUE)
rationale: This bucket targets members with diabetes who have recently engaged with SMS, optimizing for open rate. Members who have replied to SMS are more likely to engage with medication adherence programs. The SMS should emphasize medication adherence and provide additional resources.
suggested_treatment: Provide additional resources and emphasize medication adherence for diabetes management.
coverage_note: This set of buckets covers approximately 80% of the target universe, excluding members who have not engaged with SMS recently and do not have open preventive care gaps.
